description.en: Discover and list all URLs on a website. Useful for understanding site structure or finding specific pages.
description.de: Entdecke und liste alle URLs einer Website. Nützlich zum Verstehen der Site-Struktur oder zum Finden bestimmter Seiten.
description.es: Discover and list all URLs on a website. Useful for understanding site structure or finding specific pages.
description.fr: Discover and list all URLs on a website. Useful for understanding site structure or finding specific pages.
description.ro: Discover and list all URLs on a website. Useful for understanding site structure or finding specific pages.
description.it: Discover and list all URLs on a website. Useful for understanding site structure or finding specific pages.

vars.API_KEY: env:FIRECRAWL_API_KEY|Get your API key from the Firecrawl Dashboard at firecrawl.dev.

inputs.name: URL
inputs.description: The URL of the website to map.
Optional keyword to filter the discovered URLs.

inputs.name: Include Subdomains
inputs.description: Whether to include URLs from subdomains.

inputs.name: Limit
inputs.description: Maximum number of URLs to return.
